notes: Heuristic screening signal only; it is not confirmed connection capacity or connectable MW.
The score highlights visible voltage, nearby mapped assets, and mapped substation proximity inside the chosen radius.
No user-confirmed official evidence is active, so the evidence component stays at 0.

evidence_notes.label: Mapped-public OSM screening layer

evidence_notes.label: No exact capacity claim
evidence_notes.detail: Nearby lines or substations do not imply spare connection capacity; exact available MW requires official utility or TSO evidence.
